heading: Salvation Through Faith
text: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.

heading: Peace Beyond Understanding
text: And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.

heading: Strength In Weakness
text: He giveth power to the faint; and to them that have no might he increaseth strength.

heading: Divine Guidance
text: Trust in the Lord with all thine heart; and lean not unto thine own understanding. In all thy ways acknowledge him, and he shall direct thy paths.

heading: All Things Work Together
text: And we know that all things work together for good to them that love God, to them who are the called according to his purpose.

heading: Nothing Separates Us
text: For I am persuaded, that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor powers, nor things present, nor things to come, nor height, nor depth, nor any other creature, shall be able to separate us from the love of God.

heading: God Is Your Refuge
text: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

heading: Do Not Fear
text: Fear thou not; for I am with thee: be not dismayed; for I am thy God: I will strengthen thee; yea, I will help thee.

heading: He Will Never Leave You
text: I will never leave thee, nor forsake thee.

heading: New Every Morning
text: It is of the Lord's mercies that we are not consumed, because his compassions fail not. They are new every morning: great is thy faithfulness.

heading: Victorious Through Christ
text: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.

heading: Cast Your Cares
text: Casting all your care upon him; for he careth for you.

heading: Joy Comes In The Morning
text: Weeping may endure for a night, but joy cometh in the morning.

heading: Plans For Your Future
text: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the Lord, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you an expected end.

heading: Renewed Strength
text: But they that wait upon the Lord shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles; they shall run, and not be weary.

heading: Be Still And Know
text: Be still, and know that I am God: I will be exalted among the heathen, I will be exalted in the earth.

heading: Grace Is Sufficient
text: My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness.

heading: The Lord Is Your Shepherd
text: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

heading: Ask And Receive
text: Ask, and it shall be given you; seek, and ye shall find; knock, and it shall be opened unto you.

heading: All Things Are Possible
text: With God all things are possible.

heading: He Restores Your Soul
text: He restoreth my soul: he leadeth me in the paths of righteousness for his name's sake.

heading: No Weapon Shall Prosper
text: No weapon that is formed against thee shall prosper; and every tongue that shall rise against thee in judgment thou shalt condemn.

heading: God Fights For You
text: The Lord shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.

heading: Light In Darkness
text: The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The Lord is the strength of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?

heading: Spirit Of Power
text: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.

heading: Good Work Completed
text: Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will perform it until the day of Jesus Christ.

heading: Peace I Leave With You
text: Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you: not as the world giveth, give I unto you. Let not your heart be troubled, neither let it be afraid.

heading: Come Unto Me
text: Come unto me, all ye that labour and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.

heading: Greater Is He
text: Greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world.

heading: Delight In The Lord
text: Delight thyself also in the Lord: and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart.

heading: Seek First His Kingdom
text: But seek ye first the kingdom of God, and his righteousness; and all these things shall be added unto you.

heading: Joy Of The Lord
text: The joy of the Lord is your strength.

heading: God Heals The Broken
text: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

heading: Lamp To My Feet
text: Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.

heading: Fortified Tower
text: The name of the Lord is a strong tower: the righteous runneth into it, and is safe.

heading: The Lord Blesses You
text: The Lord bless thee, and keep thee: The Lord make his face shine upon thee, and be gracious unto thee.

heading: Close To The Brokenhearted
text: The Lord is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart; and saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.

heading: Overcomer In Christ
text: These things I have spoken unto you, that in me ye might have peace. In the world ye shall have tribulation: but be of good cheer; I have overcome the world.

heading: Faithful And Just
text: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.

heading: Saved By Grace
text: For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God.

heading: God Is For You
text: If God be for us, who can be against us?

heading: Made New In Christ
text: Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: old things are passed away; behold, all things are become new.

heading: Eternal Life Promise
text: For the wages of sin is death; but the gift of God is eternal life through Jesus Christ our Lord.

heading: Abundant Life
text: I am come that they might have life, and that they might have it more abundantly.

heading: The Way, Truth, Life
text: I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.

heading: Wonderfully Made
text: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made: marvellous are thy works.

heading: God Provides
text: But my God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.

heading: Living Water
text: Whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst.

heading: Light Of The World
text: I am the light of the world: he that followeth me shall not walk in darkness, but shall have the light of life.

heading: Bread Of Life
text: I am the bread of life: he that cometh to me shall never hunger; and he that believeth on me shall never thirst.

heading: Resurrection Power
text: I am the resurrection, and the life: he that believeth in me, though he were dead, yet shall he live.

heading: More Than Conquerors
text: Nay, in all these things we are more than conquerors through him that loved us.

heading: His Yoke Is Easy
text: Take my yoke upon you, and learn of me; for I am meek and lowly in heart: and ye shall find rest unto your souls.

heading: Treasures In Heaven
text: Lay up for yourselves treasures in heaven, where neither moth nor rust doth corrupt.

heading: God's Faithfulness
text: The Lord is faithful in all his words and gracious in all his works.

heading: Seeds Of Righteousness
text: They that sow in tears shall reap in joy.

heading: No Condemnation
text: There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ Jesus.

heading: Crown Of Life
text: Be thou faithful unto death, and I will give thee a crown of life.

heading: Rivers Of Living Water
text: He that believeth on me, as the scripture hath said, out of his belly shall flow rivers of living water.

heading: God Hears Your Prayers
text: And this is the confidence that we have in him, that, if we ask any thing according to his will, he heareth us.

heading: He Will Direct You
text: I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go: I will guide thee with mine eye.

heading: Abundant Pardon
text: Let the wicked forsake his way, and the unrighteous man his thoughts: and let him return unto the Lord, and he will have mercy upon him; and to our God, for he will abundantly pardon.

heading: God's Love Endures
text: Give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.

heading: Chosen And Appointed
text: Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit.

heading: Washed White As Snow
text: Though your sins be as scarlet, they shall be as white as snow.

heading: Your Faith Has Saved You
text: Thy faith hath made thee whole; go in peace.

heading: Goodness And Mercy
text: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life: and I will dwell in the house of the Lord for ever.

heading: Protected By God
text: The Lord is thy keeper: the Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand.

heading: Answered Prayer
text: Call unto me, and I will answer thee, and show thee great and mighty things, which thou knowest not.

heading: Wings Of Refuge
text: He shall cover thee with his feathers, and under his wings shalt thou trust.

heading: Everlasting Arms
text: The eternal God is thy refuge, and underneath are the everlasting arms.

heading: Victory Over Death
text: O death, where is thy sting? O grave, where is thy victory?

heading: Spirit Of Adoption
text: For ye have not received the spirit of bondage again to fear; but ye have received the Spirit of adoption, whereby we cry, Abba, Father.

heading: Walk By Faith
text: For we walk by faith, not by sight.

heading: Hope Does Not Disappoint
text: And hope maketh not ashamed; because the love of God is shed abroad in our hearts by the Holy Ghost.

heading: Prosper And Be Healthy
text: Beloved, I wish above all things that thou mayest prosper and be in health, even as thy soul prospereth.

heading: God Gives Wisdom
text: If any of you lack wisdom, let him ask of God, that giveth to all men liberally, and upbraideth not; and it shall be given him.

heading: Heavenly Citizenship
text: For our conversation is in heaven; from whence also we look for the Saviour.

heading: His Love Is Perfect
text: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear.

heading: A Future And A Hope
text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

heading: God Is Gracious
text: The Lord is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.

heading: Inheritance In Christ
text: In whom also we have obtained an inheritance, being predestinated according to the purpose of him.

heading: Seated In Heavenly Places
text: And hath raised us up together, and made us sit together in heavenly places in Christ Jesus.

heading: Redeemed By His Blood
text: In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace.

heading: Complete In Him
text: And ye are complete in him, which is the head of all principality and power.

heading: Fruit Of The Spirit
text: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, longsuffering, gentleness, goodness, faith, meekness, temperance.

heading: Children Of God
text: But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God.

heading: Dwelling In The Secret Place
text: He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty.

heading: God Is Your Shield
text: But thou, O Lord, art a shield for me; my glory, and the lifter up of mine head.

heading: Streams In The Desert
text: I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.

heading: Abide In His Love
text: As the Father hath loved me, so have I loved you: continue ye in my love.

heading: He Goes Before You
text: The Lord thy God, he it is that doth go with thee; he will not fail thee, nor forsake thee.

heading: A New Heart
text: A new heart also will I give you, and a new spirit will I put within you.

heading: Emmanuel — God With Us
text: Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel, which being interpreted is, God with us.

heading: Mountain Moving Faith
text: If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove.

heading: God Remembers You
text: Can a woman forget her sucking child? Yea, they may forget, yet will I not forget thee.

heading: Springs Of Joy
text: With joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.

heading: Standing On The Rock
text: He brought me up also out of an horrible pit, out of the miry clay, and set my feet upon a rock, and established my goings.

heading: Beauty For Ashes
text: To give unto them beauty for ashes, the oil of joy for mourning, the garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness.

heading: His Plans Are Higher
text: For my thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways, saith the Lord.

heading: Set Free Indeed
text: If the Son therefore shall make you free, ye shall be free indeed.

heading: Abundant Grace
text: Where sin abounded, grace did much more abound.

heading: He Carries Your Burdens
text: Blessed be the Lord, who daily loadeth us with benefits, even the God of our salvation.

heading: God Satisfies
text: Who satisfieth thy mouth with good things; so that thy youth is renewed like the eagle's.

heading: Walking In Truth
text: And ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.

heading: His Eye Is On You
text: The eyes of the Lord are upon the righteous, and his ears are open unto their cry.

heading: Seated At The Right Hand
text: Who is he that condemneth? It is Christ that died, yea rather, that is risen again, who is even at the right hand of God, who also maketh intercession for us.

heading: Anointed With Oil
text: Thou anointest my head with oil; my cup runneth over.

heading: Kingdom Authority
text: Behold, I give unto you power to tread on serpents and scorpions, and over all the power of the enemy: and nothing shall by any means hurt you.

heading: Rooted In Love
text: That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love.

heading: Exceedingly Abundantly
text: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us.

heading: Justified By Faith
text: Therefore being justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.

heading: Precious In His Sight
text: Since thou wast precious in my sight, thou hast been honourable, and I have loved thee.

heading: God Keeps You
text: The Lord shall preserve thee from all evil: he shall preserve thy soul.

heading: Fearless In Battle
text: Though an host should encamp against me, my heart shall not fear.

heading: Rivers In Dry Land
text: Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it?

heading: Hidden In Christ
text: For ye are dead, and your life is hid with Christ in God.

heading: Blessed Coming And Going
text: Blessed shalt thou be when thou comest in, and blessed shalt thou be when thou goest out.

heading: Prayers Of The Righteous
text: The effectual fervent prayer of a righteous man availeth much.

heading: God's Workmanship
text: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus unto good works.

heading: Forgiven And Free
text: As far as the east is from the west, so far hath he removed our transgressions from us.

heading: Love Never Fails
text: Charity never faileth: but whether there be prophecies, they shall fail; whether there be tongues, they shall cease.

heading: He Gives Sleep
text: He giveth his beloved sleep.

heading: Transformed By Renewal
text: Be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind.

heading: God Of All Comfort
text: Blessed be God, even the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies, and the God of all comfort.

heading: Standing Firm
text: Watch ye, stand fast in the faith, quit you like men, be strong.

heading: Armor Of God
text: Put on the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to stand against the wiles of the devil.

heading: Heirs With Christ
text: And if children, then heirs; heirs of God, and joint-heirs with Christ.

heading: Dwelling Place
text: Lord, thou hast been our dwelling place in all generations.

heading: God Hears Your Cry
text: This poor man cried, and the Lord heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.

heading: Blessed Are The Merciful
text: Blessed are the merciful: for they shall obtain mercy.

heading: The Lord Reigns
text: The Lord reigneth; let the earth rejoice.

heading: His Banner Over You
text: He brought me to the banqueting house, and his banner over me was love.

heading: Grace Upon Grace
text: And of his fulness have all we received, and grace for grace.

heading: Eyes Have Not Seen
text: Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which God hath prepared for them that love him.

heading: Fearfully Made
text: I will praise thee; for I am fearfully and wonderfully made.

heading: Good Shepherd
text: I am the good shepherd: the good shepherd giveth his life for the sheep.

heading: Unshakeable Kingdom
text: Wherefore we receiving a kingdom which cannot be moved, let us have grace.

heading: Peace Like A River
text: O that thou hadst hearkened to my commandments! then had thy peace been as a river.

heading: Filled With His Spirit
text: Be filled with the Spirit.

heading: Life Everlasting
text: He that believeth on the Son hath everlasting life.

heading: The Lord Is Near
text: The Lord is nigh unto all them that call upon him, to all that call upon him in truth.

heading: Prosperity Of The Soul
text: The blessing of the Lord, it maketh rich, and he addeth no sorrow with it.

heading: Tears Turned To Joy
text: Thou hast turned for me my mourning into dancing: thou hast put off my sackcloth, and girded me with gladness.

heading: Promise Of The Spirit
text: And I will pray the Father, and he shall give you another Comforter, that he may abide with you for ever.

heading: Established By God
text: The steps of a good man are ordered by the Lord: and he delighteth in his way.

heading: Healed By His Stripes
text: By whose stripes ye were healed.

heading: God Remembers Your Work
text: For God is not unrighteous to forget your work and labour of love.

heading: He Crowns You
text: Who crowneth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies.

heading: Power From On High
text: But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you.

heading: Kept By His Power
text: Who are kept by the power of God through faith unto salvation.

heading: God Is Able
text: God is able to make all grace abound toward you; that ye, always having all sufficiency in all things, may abound to every good work.

heading: Wells Of Salvation
text: Therefore with joy shall ye draw water out of the wells of salvation.

heading: A Living Hope
text: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which according to his abundant mercy hath begotten us again unto a lively hope.

heading: Ransomed By God
text: Fear not: for I have redeemed thee, I have called thee by thy name; thou art mine.

heading: Rivers Of Blessing
text: I will open rivers in high places, and fountains in the midst of the valleys.

heading: Angels Guard You
text: For he shall give his angels charge over thee, to keep thee in all thy ways.

heading: Chosen Generation
text: But ye are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, an holy nation, a peculiar people.

heading: Clothed In Righteousness
text: I will greatly rejoice in the Lord, my soul shall be joyful in my God; for he hath clothed me with the garments of salvation.

heading: Door Of Hope
text: I will give her her vineyards from thence, and the valley of Achor for a door of hope.

heading: Throne Of Grace
text: Let us therefore come boldly unto the throne of grace, that we may obtain mercy, and find grace to help in time of need.

heading: Joy Unspeakable
text: Whom having not seen, ye love; in whom, though now ye see him not, yet believing, ye rejoice with joy unspeakable and full of glory.

heading: Sealed By The Spirit
text: In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that holy Spirit of promise.

heading: Living Sacrifice
text: Present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto God, which is your reasonable service.

heading: Abiding In The Vine
text: Abide in me, and I in you. As the branch cannot bear fruit of itself, except it abide in the vine; no more can ye, except ye abide in me.

heading: Treasure In Earthen Vessels
text: We have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of God, and not of us.

heading: He Prepares A Table
text: Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies.

heading: Alpha And Omega
text: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the ending, saith the Lord, which is, and which was, and which is to come, the Almighty.

heading: Comforter Has Come
text: But the Comforter, which is the Holy Ghost, whom the Father will send in my name, he shall teach you all things.

heading: The Lord Upholds You
text: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down: for the Lord upholdeth him with his hand.

heading: Planted By Waters
text: Blessed is the man that trusteth in the Lord, and whose hope the Lord is. For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters.

heading: Nothing Is Impossible
text: For with God nothing shall be impossible.

heading: Immeasurable Love
text: And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.

heading: Rest For Your Soul
text: Thus saith the Lord, Stand ye in the ways, and see, and ask for the old paths, where is the good way, and walk therein, and ye shall find rest for your souls.

heading: Delivered From Evil
text: The Lord shall deliver me from every evil work, and will preserve me unto his heavenly kingdom.

heading: God Sees You
text: The Lord looketh from heaven; he beholdeth all the sons of men.

heading: Never Thirst Again
text: Whosoever drinketh of the water that I shall give him shall never thirst; but the water that I shall give him shall be in him a well of water springing up into everlasting life.

heading: Born Of God
text: Whosoever is born of God overcometh the world: and this is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith.

heading: Secure In His Hands
text: And I give unto them eternal life; and they shall never perish, neither shall any man pluck them out of my hand.

heading: Promise Of Return
text: I go to prepare a place for you. And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come again, and receive you unto myself.

heading: Walking In The Light
text: But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another.

heading: Kingdom Within
text: The kingdom of God is within you.

heading: Hope As An Anchor
text: Which hope we have as an anchor of the soul, both sure and stedfast.

heading: Clothed With Strength
text: She is clothed with strength and dignity; she can laugh at the days to come.

heading: Dawn After Darkness
text: The people that walked in darkness have seen a great light.

heading: Covered By His Wings
text: He shall cover thee with his feathers, and under his wings shalt thou trust: his truth shall be thy shield and buckler.

heading: Living Stones
text: Ye also, as lively stones, are built up a spiritual house.

heading: Kept In Perfect Peace
text: Thou wilt keep him in perfect peace, whose mind is stayed on thee: because he trusteth in thee.

heading: The Lord Is Good
text: The Lord is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble; and he knoweth them that trust in him.

heading: Spirit Of Truth
text: When he, the Spirit of truth, is come, he will guide you into all truth.

heading: Made Righteous
text: For he hath made him to be sin for us, who knew no sin; that we might be made the righteousness of God in him.

heading: Access By Faith
text: By whom also we have access by faith into this grace wherein we stand, and rejoice in hope of the glory of God.

heading: Fruitful In Season
text: He shall be like a tree planted by the rivers of water, that bringeth forth his fruit in his season.

heading: God's Temple
text: Know ye not that ye are the temple of God, and that the Spirit of God dwelleth in you?

heading: Blessed To Be A Blessing
text: And I will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and thou shalt be a blessing.

heading: Given All Things
text: His divine power hath given unto us all things that pertain unto life and godliness.

heading: Enduring Love
text: The Lord hath appeared of old unto me, saying, Yea, I have loved thee with an everlasting love.

heading: Filled With Fullness
text: That ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.

heading: The Good Fight
text: I have fought a good fight, I have finished my course, I have kept the faith.

heading: Wells In The Valley
text: Who passing through the valley of Baca make it a well; the rain also filleth the pools.

heading: Named And Known
text: Before I formed thee in the belly I knew thee; and before thou camest forth out of the womb I sanctified thee.

heading: God Lifts The Humble
text: Humble yourselves in the sight of the Lord, and he shall lift you up.

heading: Strength Renewed Daily
text: The Lord God is my strength, and he will make my feet like hinds' feet.

heading: Guarded By Peace
text: And the peace of God shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.

heading: Good Gifts From Above
text: Every good gift and every perfect gift is from above, and cometh down from the Father of lights.

heading: Everlasting Covenant
text: I will make an everlasting covenant with them, that I will not turn away from them, to do them good.

heading: Victory Is Certain
text: But thanks be to God, which giveth us the victory through our Lord Jesus Christ.

heading: Hidden Manna
text: To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the hidden manna, and will give him a white stone.

heading: Refined Like Gold
text: When he hath tried me, I shall come forth as gold.

heading: God Goes With You
text: Be strong and of a good courage; for the Lord thy God is with thee whithersoever thou goest.

heading: Light Dawns
text: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness.

heading: Wells Of Joy
text: Thou wilt shew me the path of life: in thy presence is fulness of joy.

heading: Love One Another
text: A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another; as I have loved you.

heading: Treasured Possession
text: Ye shall be a peculiar treasure unto me above all people.

heading: Living By The Word
text: Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.

heading: Blessed Assurance
text: These things have I written unto you that believe on the name of the Son of God; that ye may know that ye have eternal life.

heading: Boundless Mercy
text: But God, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us.

heading: Walking With God
text: And Enoch walked with God: and he was not; for God took him.

heading: Wells Never Run Dry
text: For the Lamb which is in the midst of the throne shall feed them, and shall lead them unto living fountains of waters.

heading: Cleansed Within
text: Create in me a clean heart, O God; and renew a right spirit within me.

heading: Peace In The Storm
text: And he arose, and rebuked the wind, and said unto the sea, Peace, be still. And the wind ceased, and there was a great calm.

heading: Wonders Of His Love
text: Oh that men would praise the Lord for his goodness, and for his wonderful works to the children of men!

heading: Mountains Made Low
text: Every valley shall be exalted, and every mountain and hill shall be made low.

heading: Sheltered In Him
text: In the shadow of his hand hath he hid me, and made me a polished shaft.

heading: Compassion Renewed
text: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the Lord pitieth them that fear him.

heading: Open Doors
text: Behold, I have set before thee an open door, and no man can shut it.

heading: Rain Of Blessing
text: I will cause the shower to come down in his season; there shall be showers of blessing.

heading: God Never Sleeps
text: Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.

heading: Harvest Of Joy
text: He that goeth forth and weepeth, bearing precious seed, shall doubtless come again with rejoicing, bringing his sheaves with him.

heading: Eternal Weight Of Glory
text: For our light affliction, which is but for a moment, worketh for us a far more exceeding and eternal weight of glory.

heading: Temple Of The Spirit
text: Your body is the temple of the Holy Ghost which is in you.

heading: Springs Of Water
text: I will make the wilderness a pool of water, and the dry land springs of water.

heading: God's Tender Care
text: He shall feed his flock like a shepherd: he shall gather the lambs with his arm.

heading: Unending Faithfulness
text: Great is thy faithfulness.

heading: Salt And Light
text: Ye are the salt of the earth. Ye are the light of the world.

heading: Satisfied With Long Life
text: With long life will I satisfy him, and shew him my salvation.

heading: Guided By His Spirit
text: For as many as are led by the Spirit of God, they are the sons of God.

heading: Blessed Going Out
text: The Lord shall preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth.

heading: Grace To Stand
text: By whom also we have access by faith into this grace wherein we stand.

heading: God Is My Portion
text: The Lord is my portion, saith my soul; therefore will I hope in him.

heading: Christ In You
text: Christ in you, the hope of glory.

heading: Unmoved By Trouble
text: God is in the midst of her; she shall not be moved: God shall help her.

heading: God Sees Your Tears
text: I have seen thy tears: behold, I will heal thee.

heading: Heart Of Flesh
text: I will take away the stony heart out of your flesh, and I will give you an heart of flesh.

heading: Rooted And Built Up
text: Rooted and built up in him, and stablished in the faith, abounding therein with thanksgiving.

heading: Safe In His Arms
text: The beloved of the Lord shall dwell in safety by him; and the Lord shall cover him all the day long.

heading: Bread From Heaven
text: He gave them bread from heaven to eat.

heading: God Is Your Song
text: The Lord is my strength and song, and he is become my salvation.

heading: Springs In The Desert
text: The parched ground shall become a pool, and the thirsty land springs of water.

heading: Pressing Toward The Mark
text: I press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.

heading: He Makes All Things New
text: Behold, I make all things new.

heading: Abundant Harvest
text: He which soweth bountifully shall reap also bountifully.

heading: Always Interceding
text: He ever liveth to make intercession for them.

heading: Unchanging God
text: Jesus Christ the same yesterday, and to day, and for ever.

heading: The Door Is Open
text: I am the door: by me if any man enter in, he shall be saved.

heading: Mind Of Christ
text: We have the mind of Christ.

heading: Dwelling In Unity
text: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!

heading: Mountains Shall Depart
text: For the mountains shall depart, and the hills be removed; but my kindness shall not depart from thee.

heading: Led By Still Waters
text: He leadeth me beside the still waters.

heading: God Is Your Sun
text: For the Lord God is a sun and shield: the Lord will give grace and glory.

heading: Crowned With Glory
text: Thou hast crowned him with glory and honour.

heading: Raised To Life
text: If the Spirit of him that raised up Jesus from the dead dwell in you, he shall also quicken your mortal bodies.

heading: Singing Over You
text: The Lord thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save, he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love, he will joy over thee with singing.

heading: Girded With Strength
text: It is God that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way perfect.

heading: God Turns Mourning
text: I will turn their mourning into joy, and will comfort them, and make them rejoice from their sorrow.

heading: Grace And Truth
text: For the law was given by Moses, but grace and truth came by Jesus Christ.

heading: Great Reward
text: Cast not away therefore your confidence, which hath great recompence of reward.

heading: Compassion Of The Lord
text: The Lord is full of compassion and mercy.

heading: Strength In Joy
text: In thy presence is fulness of joy; at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore.

heading: Lamp In Darkness
text: For thou wilt light my candle: the Lord my God will enlighten my darkness.

heading: Planted Forever
text: The righteous shall flourish like the palm tree: he shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.

heading: Seek And Find
text: And ye shall seek me, and find me, when ye shall search for me with all your heart.

heading: Morning Star Rises
text: I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.

heading: Revived By God
text: Wilt thou not revive us again: that thy people may rejoice in thee?

heading: God Rebuilds
text: The Lord doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel.

heading: Firm Foundation
text: For other foundation can no man lay than that is laid, which is Jesus Christ.

heading: Running Without Weariness
text: They shall run, and not be weary; and they shall walk, and not faint.

heading: Embraced By God
text: I have loved thee with an everlasting love: therefore with lovingkindness have I drawn thee.

heading: Delivered From Darkness
text: Who hath delivered us from the power of darkness, and hath translated us into the kingdom of his dear Son.

heading: Promise Of Heaven
text: In my Father's house are many mansions: if it were not so, I would have told you.

heading: Eternal Comfort
text: Now our Lord Jesus Christ himself, and God, even our Father, which hath loved us, and hath given us everlasting consolation and good hope through grace.

heading: God Of Peace
text: And the God of peace shall bruise Satan under your feet shortly.

heading: Filled With Knowledge
text: The earth shall be full of the knowledge of the Lord, as the waters cover the sea.

heading: Eyes On The Sparrow
text: Fear ye not therefore, ye are of more value than many sparrows.

heading: Satisfied In Him
text: For he satisfieth the longing soul, and filleth the hungry soul with goodness.

heading: Radiant Face
text: They looked unto him, and were lightened: and their faces were not ashamed.

heading: United In Purpose
text: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!

heading: Immovable Faith
text: Therefore, my beloved brethren, be ye stedfast, unmoveable, always abounding in the work of the Lord.

heading: Heart's Desire Granted
text: The Lord will give strength unto his people; the Lord will bless his people with peace.

heading: Standing On Promises
text: For all the promises of God in him are yea, and in him Amen, unto the glory of God by us.

heading: Faithful God
text: God is faithful, by whom ye were called unto the fellowship of his Son Jesus Christ our Lord.

heading: Upheld By Grace
text: Fear thou not; for I am with thee: be not dismayed; for I am thy God.

heading: Kingdom Come
text: Thy kingdom come, Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven.

heading: Dwell In His Courts
text: Blessed are they that dwell in thy house: they will be still praising thee.

heading: Standing Tall In Faith
text: The just shall live by faith.

heading: God Remembers His Covenant
text: He hath remembered his covenant for ever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations.

heading: Renewed Day By Day
text: Though our outward man perish, yet the inward man is renewed day by day.

heading: An Ever Present Help
text: God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.

heading: Song In The Night
text: The Lord will command his lovingkindness in the daytime, and in the night his song shall be with me.

heading: Blessings Overtake You
text: All these blessings shall come on thee, and overtake thee, if thou shalt hearken unto the voice of the Lord thy God.

heading: Abundant Mercy
text: The Lord is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.

heading: Pathway To Life
text: Thou wilt shew me the path of life.

heading: Burdens Lifted
text: Cast thy burden upon the Lord, and he shall sustain thee.

heading: Dawn Of Salvation
text: The Sun of righteousness shall arise with healing in his wings.

heading: Protection In Battle
text: The Lord is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer.

heading: Healing Waters
text: And by the river upon the bank thereof shall grow all trees for meat, whose leaf shall not fade.

heading: Promise Of Harvest
text: Let us not be weary in well doing: for in due season we shall reap, if we faint not.

heading: God Of Wonders
text: Great things doeth he, which we cannot comprehend.

heading: Walking Through Waters
text: When thou passest through the waters, I will be with thee.

heading: Enthroned In Praise
text: But thou art holy, O thou that inhabitest the praises of Israel.

heading: Garden Of Grace
text: And the Lord shall guide thee continually, and satisfy thy soul in drought.

heading: Garment Of Praise
text: The garment of praise for the spirit of heaviness; that they might be called trees of righteousness.

heading: Healing Balm
text: Is there no balm in Gilead; is there no physician there?

heading: Heavenly Bread
text: Give us this day our daily bread.

heading: Hidden Treasures
text: And I will give thee the treasures of darkness, and hidden riches of secret places.

heading: Holy Ground
text: The place whereon thou standest is holy ground.

heading: Jehovah Jireh
text: Abraham called the name of that place Jehovahjireh: the Lord will provide.

heading: Key Of David
text: He that openeth, and no man shutteth; and shutteth, and no man openeth.

heading: Kingdom Inheritance
text: Come, ye blessed of my Father, inherit the kingdom prepared for you from the foundation of the world.

heading: Lasting Fruit
text: I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain.

heading: Lion Of Judah
text: The Lion of the tribe of Juda, the Root of David, hath prevailed.

heading: Majesty Of God
text: Thine, O Lord is the greatness, and the power, and the glory, and the victory, and the majesty.

heading: Morning Star Promise
text: And I will give him the morning star.

heading: Never Forsaken
text: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken.

heading: Oil Of Gladness
text: God hath anointed thee with the oil of gladness above thy fellows.

heading: Open Heavens
text: Prove me now herewith, if I will not open you the windows of heaven, and pour you out a blessing.

heading: Overflowing Cup
text: My cup runneth over.

heading: Peace On Earth
text: Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men.

heading: Pearl Of Great Price
text: The kingdom of heaven is like unto a merchant man, seeking goodly pearls.

heading: Pillar Of Fire
text: And the Lord went before them by day in a pillar of a cloud, to lead them the way.

heading: Precious Blood
text: Ye were not redeemed with corruptible things, as silver and gold, but with the precious blood of Christ.

heading: Promised Land
text: I will bring you in unto the land, concerning the which I did swear to give it to Abraham.

heading: Quiet Resting Place
text: In quietness and in confidence shall be your strength.

heading: Rainbow Promise
text: I do set my bow in the cloud, and it shall be for a token of a covenant between me and the earth.

heading: Refreshing Rain
text: He shall come down like rain upon the mown grass: as showers that water the earth.

heading: Restoring Years
text: I will restore to you the years that the locust hath eaten.

heading: Righteous Judge
text: There is laid up for me a crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, shall give me at that day.

heading: River Of Life
text: And he shewed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal.

heading: Rose Of Sharon
text: I am the rose of Sharon, and the lily of the valleys.

heading: Royal Diadem
text: Thou shalt also be a crown of glory in the hand of the Lord, and a royal diadem in the hand of thy God.

heading: Saving Grace
text: For the grace of God that bringeth salvation hath appeared to all men.

heading: Seasons Of Refreshing
text: Repent ye therefore, and be converted, that your sins may be blotted out, when the times of refreshing shall come.

heading: Shining Path
text: But the path of the just is as the shining light, that shineth more and more unto the perfect day.

heading: Song Of Deliverance
text: Thou art my hiding place; thou shalt preserve me from trouble; thou shalt compass me about with songs of deliverance.

heading: Steadfast Love
text: But the mercy of the Lord is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear him.

heading: Still Small Voice
text: And after the earthquake a fire; but the Lord was not in the fire: and after the fire a still small voice.

heading: Stone Of Help
text: Hitherto hath the Lord helped us.

heading: Sure Foundation
text: Behold, I lay in Zion for a foundation a stone, a tried stone, a precious corner stone, a sure foundation.

heading: Sweet Fellowship
text: That which we have seen and heard declare we unto you, that ye also may have fellowship with us.

heading: Tender Shepherd
text: He shall gather the lambs with his arm, and carry them in his bosom.

heading: Tower Of Strength
text: For thou hast been a shelter for me, and a strong tower from the enemy.

heading: Tree Of Life
text: To him that overcometh will I give to eat of the tree of life, which is in the midst of the paradise of God.

heading: Triumphant Entry
text: Thanks be unto God, which always causeth us to triumph in Christ.

heading: True Vine
text: I am the true vine, and my Father is the husbandman.

heading: Unchanging Promise
text: God is not a man, that he should lie; neither the son of man, that he should repent.

heading: Water From The Rock
text: He opened the rock, and the waters gushed out; they ran in the dry places like a river.

heading: White Raiment
text: He that overcometh, the same shall be clothed in white raiment.

heading: Wings Like Eagles
text: They shall mount up with wings as eagles.

heading: Witness Of The Spirit
text: The Spirit itself beareth witness with our spirit, that we are the children of God.

heading: Word Made Flesh
text: And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us, and we beheld his glory.

heading: Worthy Is The Lamb
text: Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power, and riches, and wisdom, and strength.

heading: Year Of Jubilee
text: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel to the poor.

heading: Zealous For Good
text: Who gave himself for us, that he might redeem us from all iniquity.

heading: Abundantly Pardoned
text: Let him return unto the Lord, and he will have mercy upon him; for he will abundantly pardon.

heading: Bread For The Journey
text: And having food and raiment let us be therewith content.

heading: Cities Of Refuge
text: The Lord also will be a refuge for the oppressed, a refuge in times of trouble.

heading: Cloud Of Witnesses
text: Seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us run with patience the race.

heading: Day Of Gladness
text: This is the day which the Lord hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

heading: Dew Of Heaven
text: God give thee of the dew of heaven, and the fatness of the earth, and plenty of corn and wine.

heading: Eagle's Wings
text: I bare you on eagles' wings, and brought you unto myself.

heading: Faithful Witness
text: These things saith the Amen, the faithful and true witness.

heading: Glorious Liberty
text: The glorious liberty of the children of God.

heading: God's Delight
text: He will save, he will rejoice over thee with joy; he will rest in his love.

heading: Harvest Is Coming
text: Be patient therefore, brethren, unto the coming of the Lord.

heading: Heaven Opened
text: Hereafter ye shall see heaven open, and the angels of God ascending and descending upon the Son of man.

heading: Helper Of The Helpless
text: Thou art the helper of the fatherless.

heading: Holy Habitation
text: Lord, I have loved the habitation of thy house, and the place where thine honour dwelleth.

heading: House Of Prayer
text: My house shall be called the house of prayer for all people.

heading: Inheritance Incorruptible
text: To an inheritance incorruptible, and undefiled, and that fadeth not away, reserved in heaven for you.

heading: Jehovah Nissi
text: And Moses built an altar, and called the name of it Jehovahnissi: The Lord is my banner.

heading: Joyful Sound
text: Blessed is the people that know the joyful sound: they shall walk, O Lord, in the light of thy countenance.

heading: Keeper Of Souls
text: The Lord is thy keeper: the Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand.

heading: Kindness Of God
text: Not knowing that the goodness of God leadeth thee to repentance.

heading: Land Of Deliverance
text: I have surely seen the affliction of my people: and I am come down to deliver them.

heading: Living Bread
text: I am the living bread which came down from heaven: if any man eat of this bread, he shall live for ever.

heading: Manna From Heaven
text: I will rain bread from heaven for you.

heading: Mighty To Save
text: The Lord thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save.

heading: New Creation
text: If any man be in Christ, he is a new creature.

heading: Overcomer's Crown
text: To him that overcometh will I grant to sit with me in my throne.

heading: Precious Promises
text: Whereby are given unto us exceeding great and precious promises.

heading: Quieted With Love
text: He will rest in his love, he will joy over thee with singing.

heading: Refreshed In Spirit
text: Come ye yourselves apart into a desert place, and rest a while.

heading: Shepherd's Voice
text: My sheep hear my voice, and I know them, and they follow me.

heading: Truth Sets Free
text: Ye shall know the truth, and the truth shall make you free.

heading: Unfailing Love
text: His compassions fail not. They are new every morning.

heading: Victorious Living
text: In all these things we are more than conquerors through him that loved us.

heading: Watchful Eyes
text: Behold, the eye of the Lord is upon them that fear him.

heading: Abounding Grace
text: The grace of our Lord was exceeding abundant with faith and love.

heading: Anchor Holds
text: Which hope we have as an anchor of the soul, both sure and stedfast.

heading: Blessed Nation
text: Blessed is the nation whose God is the Lord.

heading: Canopy Of Love
text: He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty.

heading: Divine Exchange
text: He hath made him to be sin for us, who knew no sin; that we might be made the righteousness of God.

heading: Eternal Dwelling
text: In my Father's house are many mansions.

heading: Fire By Night
text: The Lord went before them by night in a pillar of fire, to give them light.

heading: Golden Streets
text: And the street of the city was pure gold, as it were transparent glass.

heading: Harbor Of Peace
text: He maketh the storm a calm, so that the waves thereof are still.

heading: Iron Sharpens
text: Iron sharpeneth iron; so a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend.

heading: Justice Rolls Down
text: But let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.

heading: Keeper Of Israel
text: He that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.

heading: Lavish Love
text: Behold, what manner of love the Father hath bestowed upon us, that we should be called the sons of God.

heading: Merciful Father
text: Like as a father pitieth his children, so the Lord pitieth them that fear him.

heading: Name Above All
text: Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name.

heading: Olive Branch
text: But I am like a green olive tree in the house of God: I trust in the mercy of God for ever.

heading: Potter's Hands
text: But now, O Lord, thou art our father; we are the clay, and thou our potter.

heading: Quickened Spirit
text: It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing.

heading: Redeemer Lives
text: For I know that my redeemer liveth, and that he shall stand at the latter day upon the earth.

heading: Sanctuary Of God
text: The Lord is in his holy temple: let all the earth keep silence before him.

heading: Tabernacle Of God
text: Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them.

heading: Under His Shadow
text: He that dwelleth in the secret place of the most High shall abide under the shadow of the Almighty.

heading: Valley Of Decision
text: Multitudes, multitudes in the valley of decision: for the day of the Lord is near.

heading: Walled City
text: In that day shall this song be sung: We have a strong city; salvation will God appoint for walls.

heading: Yoke Removed
text: For my yoke is easy, and my burden is light.

heading: Zeal Of The Lord
text: The zeal of the Lord of hosts will perform this.

heading: Adopted Children
text: Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself.

heading: Blood Covenant
text: This is my blood of the new testament, which is shed for many for the remission of sins.

heading: City On A Hill
text: A city that is set on an hill cannot be hid.

heading: Dayspring From On High
text: The dayspring from on high hath visited us, to give light to them that sit in darkness.

heading: Enduring Word
text: The grass withereth, the flower fadeth: but the word of our God shall stand for ever.

heading: Fountain Opened
text: In that day there shall be a fountain opened to the house of David for sin and for uncleanness.

heading: God Of The Hills
text: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the Lord is round about his people.

heading: Heart Of Worship
text: God is a Spirit: and they that worship him must worship him in spirit and in truth.

heading: Increase Of Faith
text: Lord, Increase our faith.

heading: Just And True
text: Great and marvellous are thy works, Lord God Almighty; just and true are thy ways.

heading: Kingdom Keys
text: I will give unto thee the keys of the kingdom of heaven.

heading: Lily Of The Valley
text: I am the rose of Sharon, and the lily of the valleys.

heading: Mighty Warrior
text: The Lord thy God in the midst of thee is mighty.

heading: Night Season Wisdom
text: I will bless the Lord, who hath given me counsel: my reins also instruct me in the night seasons.

heading: Offering Of Praise
text: By him therefore let us offer the sacrifice of praise to God continually.

heading: Prince Of Peace
text: For unto us a child is born: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The Prince of Peace.

heading: Quenching Thirst
text: If any man thirst, let him come unto me, and drink.

heading: Resurrection Morning
text: He is not here: for he is risen, as he said.

heading: Shelter From Storm
text: For thou hast been a strength to the poor, a strength to the needy in his distress, a refuge from the storm.

heading: Throne Room Access
text: Let us come boldly unto the throne of grace.

heading: Unbreakable Bond
text: Who shall separate us from the love of Christ?

heading: Vineyard Keeper
text: I am the vine, ye are the branches: He that abideth in me, and I in him, the same bringeth forth much fruit.

heading: Warrior God
text: The Lord is a man of war: the Lord is his name.

heading: Yearning For Home
text: For here have we no continuing city, but we seek one to come.

heading: Zion's Glory
text: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined.

heading: All Sufficient God
text: I am the Almighty God; walk before me, and be thou perfect.

heading: Banner Of Victory
text: Thou hast given a banner to them that fear thee, that it may be displayed because of the truth.

heading: Coming Glory
text: For I reckon that the sufferings of this present time are not worthy to be compared with the glory which shall be revealed.

heading: Deep Calling Deep
text: Deep calleth unto deep at the noise of thy waterspouts.

heading: Ebenezer Stone
text: Then Samuel took a stone: Hitherto hath the Lord helped us.

heading: Faithful Creator
text: Let them that suffer according to the will of God commit the keeping of their souls to him in well doing, as unto a faithful Creator.

heading: Gate Of Heaven
text: I am the door: by me if any man enter in, he shall be saved.

heading: Heart Of Gold
text: The Lord seeth not as man seeth; for man looketh on the outward appearance, but the Lord looketh on the heart.

heading: Immovable Rock
text: He only is my rock and my salvation; he is my defence; I shall not be greatly moved.

heading: Jewel In His Crown
text: And they shall be mine, saith the Lord of hosts, in that day when I make up my jewels.

heading: King Of Kings
text: And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.

heading: Lamp Of Heaven
text: And the city had no need of the sun, neither of the moon: for the glory of God did lighten it.

heading: Mercy Seat
text: And there I will meet with thee, and I will commune with thee from above the mercy seat.

heading: New Song
text: And he hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God.

heading: Open Gates
text: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will go into them, and I will praise the Lord.

heading: Promised Seed
text: And in thy seed shall all the nations of the earth be blessed.

heading: Quiver Full
text: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them: they shall not be ashamed.

heading: Rain Of Righteousness
text: He shall come unto us as the rain, as the latter and former rain unto the earth.

heading: Shield Of Faith
text: Above all, taking the shield of faith, wherewith ye shall be able to quench all the fiery darts of the wicked.

heading: Testimony Of Jesus
text: The testimony of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy.

heading: Upper Room Power
text: And when the day of Pentecost was fully come, they were all filled with the Holy Ghost.

heading: Vessels Of Honor
text: If a man therefore purge himself from these, he shall be a vessel unto honour.

heading: Widow's Oil
text: The barrel of meal shall not waste, neither shall the cruse of oil fail.

heading: Christ Our Passover
text: For even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.

heading: Bread Of Presence
text: I am the bread of life.

heading: God Of Breakthroughs
text: The Lord hath broken forth upon mine enemies before me, as the breach of waters.

heading: Cleft Of The Rock
text: I will put thee in a clift of the rock, and will cover thee with my hand.

heading: Full Armor
text: Wherefore take unto you the whole armour of God, that ye may be able to withstand in the evil day.

heading: God Our Healer
text: I am the Lord that healeth thee.

heading: Covenant Keeper
text: Know therefore that the Lord thy God, he is God, the faithful God, which keepeth covenant.

heading: God Our Banner
text: The Lord is my banner.

heading: Mountain Mover
text: For verily I say unto you, If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence.

heading: Fortress Of Salvation
text: He is my refuge and my fortress: my God; in him will I trust.

heading: Balm Of Gilead
text: Is there no balm in Gilead? Is there no physician there?

heading: Cup Of Blessing
text: The cup of blessing which we bless, is it not the communion of the blood of Christ?

heading: Doors Of Utterance
text: God would open unto us a door of utterance, to speak the mystery of Christ.

heading: Everlasting Light
text: The Lord shall be unto thee an everlasting light, and thy God thy glory.

heading: Faithful High Priest
text: We have a great high priest, that is passed into the heavens, Jesus the Son of God.

heading: Green Pastures
text: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures: he leadeth me beside the still waters.

heading: Heart Transplant
text: A new heart also will I give you, and a new spirit will I put within you.

heading: Imperial Decree
text: Thou shalt also decree a thing, and it shall be established unto thee.

heading: Jubilee Freedom
text: And ye shall hallow the fiftieth year, and proclaim liberty throughout all the land.

heading: Kingdom Authority Given
text: All power is given unto me in heaven and in earth.

heading: Lamp That Burns
text: For thou wilt light my candle: the Lord my God will enlighten my darkness.

heading: Majestic Name
text: O Lord our Lord, how excellent is thy name in all the earth!

heading: Never Ending Story
text: Jesus Christ the same yesterday, and to day, and for ever.

heading: Olive Trees Standing
text: These are the two olive trees, and the two candlesticks standing before the God of the earth.

heading: Provision In Desert
text: He clave the rocks in the wilderness, and gave them drink as out of the great depths.

heading: Royal Priesthood
text: Ye are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, an holy nation.

heading: Sceptre Of Righteousness
text: A sceptre of righteousness is the sceptre of thy kingdom.

heading: Temple Restored
text: The glory of this latter house shall be greater than of the former.

heading: Unfading Crown
text: When the chief Shepherd shall appear, ye shall receive a crown of glory that fadeth not away.
